visual_description: Two men are in a kitchen; one sits on a stool holding a piece of paper, while the other leans over the counter beside him, hands clasped, looking at the paper. The seated man looks down at the paper, while the standing man leans in closely, his gaze fixed on the paper. The scene includes a refrigerator, stove, microwave, and a foosball table in the foreground.
